---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in RIDOS OS
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Boot RIDOS OS from USB
2. Open ridos-shell
3. Type '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include the full error message.

## Environment
- **RIDOS OS Version:** (run `/version` in ridos-shell)
- **Hardware:** (CPU, RAM, old/new machine)
- **Boot mode:** BIOS / UEFI
- **Network:** Online / Offline

## Logs
Paste relevant logs from `/var/log/ridos/daemon.log`

```
paste logs here
```
